message:
fix: gate DatabaseConfig fix behind SQLite backend check (bd-0xqi)

DatabaseConfig was a silent no-op for Dolt users because findActualDBFile
only searches for .db files. Now returns a clear error message for Dolt
backends explaining the fix only applies to SQLite. Existing tests updated
to explicitly set BackendSQLite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
